stemHtml: During the day, a pilot who is assigned an afternoon flying duty begins to feel slight cold symptoms, though they do NOT cause him/her any discomfort. The pilot...

options.a: should seek medical advice because the symptoms could become worse and pose a risk to his/her ability to safely pilot the aircraft.
options.b: can decide that he/she is fit to fly and accept the flying duty because the symptoms are very mild.
options.c: think carefully about flying as cold symptoms can become worse in case of flight above FL250, while they are NOT affected when flying at lower levels.
options.d: can accept the flying duty because some of the symptoms will be alleviated in the in-flight environment.
